title: Parameter Golf Submission - Efficient 21K Parameter Language Model
author: Vinaya-ai

data.description: Compact architecture with embedding dimension 16 and hidden dimension 64 to reduce parameter count
Reduced vocabulary size to 200 to provide a dense learning signal
Optimized training strategy with learning rate 0.005 and 30 epochs

novel_contributions: Reduced vocabulary size to 200 for dense learning signal
Compact architecture with embedding=16 and hidden=64
Optimized training strategy with lr=0.005 and 30 epochs
Focus on maximizing performance per parameter rather than absolute model size
Fully reproducible model with all components included (weights, config, training log, execution script, tokenizer files)
